title: chelonespermum majus
intro: Chelonespermum majus, also known as Ceylon leadwort, is a flowering plant species in the family Gesneriaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Chelonespermum majus include reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and alleviating pain. Chelonespermum majus can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
